name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Issues to solve in 2018
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
As a top supporter, the President has requested your response... |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0f40b2034237d6fcf8f3d07e32941c8b6dae5972f4a3c2bd94cc0c2d79897ae15faeef7213e8e34493b445184648871829e291eb21e968e2)**

Friend,

Our President is not afraid to tackle the problems facing our country head on.

Now, as we head into President Trump's second year in office, we want to know what you think of the Administration's progress on some key issues.
---
[TAKE THE OFFICIAL POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0f40b2034237d6fc410c4fa92115073b310b74cf0f320702d32dafe26f56ed98faa87f52b1ac5d001b33abc64bd69872d6dabda2a414b442) This is a quick, 10-question survey designed for top supporters like you to share their input with our team and the President.

We've had some big league victories for the American people, the hardworking middle-class, and would love to know what you think, Friend.

**[Please, take the Official Issue Approval Poll to share your thoughts today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0f40b2034237d6fc0f0ba63525d9c90d1532b218c19f10ad161bf49eda5401085fbbfd4133606e2c4f916211cea52418a9ce5011087425f2)**

Thank you,

Trump Headquarters

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Protect Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd2/2a380d31/4a26dba/f1eb6a/3556516406/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd2/2a380d31/4a26dba/f1eb6a/3556516406/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
Just a few days ago, Vice President Mike Pence stood in front of a room of anti-abortion activists and touted the "great progress" the Trump administration has made toward rolling back access to reproductive health care.
He didn't stop there -- he claimed that the clock is rolling so far back on women's rights that **we could go back to the days before _Roe v. Wade_ and once again ban legal abortion "in our time."**
We need to fight against these attacks with everything we've got.**[Please sign our petition and tell Mike Pence and ultraconservative Republicans that denying women the right to make their own health care decisions isn't just wrong, it puts women's lives and safety on the line.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd2/2a380d31/4a26dba/f1eb6b/3556516406/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180303_ProtectReproductiveRights?source=e20180303_ProtectRR_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
The scary thing is that if we're not careful, there could be some truth to what Pence said. Toward the end of last year, House Republicans passed a ban on abortion after 20 weeks.
As long as these attacks on women's reproductive health care continue, we cannot have an equal society. So, as long as these attacks continue, we've got to do everything we can to fight back.
**One of the best ways to do that is to add your name to this petition calling on Republicans to stop undermining a woman 's right to choose. [Click here to sign.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd2/2a380d31/4a26dba/f1eb6b/3556516406/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180303_ProtectReproductiveRights?source=e20180303_ProtectRR_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Thank you for speaking out,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd2/2a380d31/4a26dba/f1eb54/3556516406/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19uZXQtbmV1dHJhbGl0eS11cCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTgwMzAzX1JlcFJvU2lnbk9uX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_net-neutrality-up?refcode=e20180303_RepRoSignOn_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd2/2a380d31/4a26dba/f1eb55/3556516406/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**

[ ](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd2/2a380d31/4a26dba/f1eb56/3556516406/VEsB/ "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/legalcode")
clean_body: "" "" Team -- Just a few days ago, Vice President Mike Pence stood in front of a room of anti-abortion activists and touted the "great progress" the Trump administration has made toward rolling back access to reproductive health care. He didn't stop there -- he claimed that the clock is rolling so far back on women's rights that we could go back to the days before Roe v. Wade and once again ban legal abortion "in our time." We need to fight against these attacks with everything we've got. "" The scary thing is that if we're not careful, there could be some truth to what Pence said. Toward the end of last year, House Republicans passed a ban on abortion after 20 weeks. As long as these attacks on women's reproductive health care continue, we cannot have an equal society. So, as long as these attacks continue, we've got to do everything we can to fight back. One of the best ways to do that is to add your name to this petition calling on Republicans to stop undermining a woman 's right to choose. "" Thank you for speaking out, Team Maggie ""

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: re: Your completed survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Complete your Listening to America Survey. |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

We never received your 2018 Listening to America Survey. There's no better time to complete it than during the Oscars -- while a bunch of Hollywood liberals prove to the country that they have NO IDEA what the _real_ America thinks or believes.
**[LISTENING TO AMERICA SURVEY 2018 EDITION](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b433e2baa369f7c324ef6321375c9e38d18ead4438a89fe76bfc1f09b05637fb7cf952adf3d8a8b21518d7feba2f5d4af21d26c8d5975aec)** **PARTICIPANT: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b433e2baa369f7c3e11edf201e542b559c29b5bcdea7ae2d35733191aff6dcb6ef83bc588ae23e72bf12c401b6cc0e7db7127a6e4d7b27bb)** **DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT** ******[ **TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b433e2baa369f7c344a788bcb5371043d8735f03c1de2ca317f6caa185758ee82501fdb3c10d3f54e0eff18789b1df442a8e664cd45dda78)******
**[Please take the 2018 Listening to America Survey now.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b433e2baa369f7c3c1094b1c9c79314a876ed6bef489bc4dcf358d00fced2c663427c8eac14a8d3e7cc346eaab6ac4d05dccdb231dd3e674)**

The Oscars are NOTHING but a three-hour ad by Hollywood liberals blasting their hatred for hardworking patriots like you.

If they actually left their bubble, they'd learn about the real America where we believe in STRONG borders (yes, a WALL!), stopping radical Islamic terrorism, championing the right to life, defending ourselves and our families, and always, always, always putting America FIRST.

**[Please take the 2018 Listening to America Survey now.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b433e2baa369f7c3a24cd13b2e0950f144e9dc094383b6b818e3584d40983aeaf2fe06e893d5b6607b3ee8808c631ef9421210f231ff0261)**

Thanks,

Team TRUMP

[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b433e2baa369f7c31fc1e042327dec7bbf58f1a2d0cd2064c1378356c0109f5b01d9f43e16cea950a60b072a1330bbd8586aa0cc5fc79ade)
**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** We've heard enough from the media.
**Date:** March 3, 2018
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=410937cb7a1c2dc94c29a8d0490c21d3e16dac7b6400333d6b8e04c3ee7461ae7072b8435ee28e59f38ffffdc44e2ea708f1df482b48b324)**

---
| [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=410937cb7a1c2dc9c4bdea8ff15f44432ea60aaf0a4e1dc4b7d45a59b88b4e3b9f6f57c945bb60c1fc257df6f0f101e1dacc505320a6eb53)
---

Friend,

Everyone in D.C. and the media have been shouting at each other, but they need to stop and listen to the only people that matter -- YOU.

Reporters don't get to make laws and politicians don't get to usher in sweeping change without FIRST consulting you.

_It 's time for Washington to stop bickering and LISTEN to America._

**[That's why I've commissioned a brand new Listening to America Survey for the 2018 year for you to take IMMEDIATELY.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=410937cb7a1c2dc9ba45a25b98c91901ab9a52fcb028a588c5c0073ef3a3ec15f65bea0397fbd4529967c8b79ea392bca511e168ccb0a3d4)**
---
|
I've released this survey every year since 2016, and it's been a huge success. It's our best way to hear from the REAL America on the big issues of the day.

And every single time we learn the same thing -- that the mainstream media is TOTALLY out of touch with the hardworking Americans who truly run our nation.

Now I want to use this survey to ensure we're fighting for YOUR priorities as we move forward in 2018.

**[Please take the Listening to America Survey for the 2018 year.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=410937cb7a1c2dc980acca0e7712f0091ff75cf1828e564a249683b981717ecf964a677c613fea7c49ed6f6fa2b6e292c2f87d8dba5e8e77)**

THANK YOU,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=410937cb7a1c2dc9f52247f6b5f05543238dd7c6a034097d77ce87992bd6dcc8b114919d963923fdd5a0ce18b3429ad8823ed67965297564)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b433e2baa369f7c31fc1e042327dec7bbf58f1a2d0cd2064c1378356c0109f5b01d9f43e16cea950a60b072a1330bbd8586aa0cc5fc79ade)
---

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=410937cb7a1c2dc9b7273b46d7251ffa928e80851809623210c0080a8ffadc672458514ff69f91b02ab1e487f92df3414b0550334c8c5e5e) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc29ff180f217f4fa4d028afaf4fd0abc46d7a6a5860248a1aff9fb812b4ab3f860b848b4bf7e3a9681832cea2bb0849f70a94a866993ee5d6) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256ce50479c30455dc7e9dd659d672a1e880e234ef4584dc5935045951bb8586319efc5e67e889b3efd0)

name: Amanda Brown Lierman, Democrats.org
subject: We need you to vote, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
When more people vote, Democrats win. Add your name to commit to vote this fall.
---
Your vote is your power, Derek. Don't ever forget that.

IWillVote is the DNC's new campaign to organize around voting -- and the only way we'll be successful is if millions of people get involved.

**Add your name today to say you will vote this fall.**

**[COMMIT TO VOTE](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/IWillVote?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+COMMIT+TO+VOTE&utm_campaign=em_20180304_abl_bsd&source=em_20180304_abl_bsd")**
This week we launched IWillVote to kick off a conversation about voting and ensure all voters are able to make their voices heard this fall. The IWillVote national campaign includes commit to vote; voter registration; voter education and protection; and get-out-the-vote.

We have an ambitious goal of reaching 50 million voters by November -- and we need your help. When more people vote, Democrats win.

**[Add your name today to say you are committed to voting this fall.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052277e/4067b0a/57b5f383d/7e560315/1816305608/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/IWillVote?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+today+to+say+you+are+commi&utm_campaign=em_20180304_abl_bsd&source=em_20180304_abl_bsd")**

Each and every one of us has the power to make a difference in this election. Thanks for committing to vote.

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052277e/4067b0a/57b5f383d/7e560312/1816305608/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180304_abl_bsd&source=em_20180304_abl_bsd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052277e/4067b0a/57b5f383d/7e560313/1816305608/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180304_abl_bsd&source=em_20180304_abl_bsd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052277e/4067b0a/57b5f383d/7e560310/1816305608/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180304_abl_bsd&source=em_20180304_abl_bsd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052277e/4067b0a/57b5f383d/7e560311/1816305608/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180304_abl_bsd&source=em_20180304_abl_bsd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

The IWillVote national campaign includes commit to vote; voter registration; voter education and protection; and get-out-the-vote. name: New Mexico Victory
subject: The latest news for you:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend,

While President Trump's administration is dominating the national headlines, the fight for the Senate majority is being waged on the ground, in key states like New Mexico. Here's the latest:

* Martin now has TWO right-wing opponents in the race. That means attacks will be coming from all angles as we head into November.
* The Koch brothers have vowed to spend **$400 MILLION** in the 2018 midterms to defeat Democrats, and they already have boots on the ground here in New Mexico.
* **Now we need to hit our next fundraising goal, and we are coming up short. This is an urgent deadline that we cannot miss.**

If we do not secure victory in New Mexico, Democrats could fall short of taking back the Senate majority. That is why we cannot miss a single fundraising deadline between now and Election Day.

[_**Here 's what we need to do: close our funding gap by receiving 250 grassroots donations before midnight tonight. Will you chip in $27 or more and help us stay on track for victory?**_](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline?amount=27&recurring=true&refcode2=landscape&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Herersquos+what+we+need+to+do+close+our+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180304_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180304_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180304_1_1")

Here's the latest: Martin now has TWO right-wing opponents in the race. That means attacks will be coming from all angles as we head into November. The Koch brothers have vowed to spend $400 MILLION in the 2018 midterms to defeat Democrats, and they already have boots on the ground here in New Mexico. Now we need to hit our next fundraising goal, and we are coming up short. This is an urgent deadline that we cannot miss. If we do not secure victory in New Mexico, Democrats could fall short of taking back the Senate majority. That is why we cannot miss a single fundraising deadline between now and Election Day. name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
It's been a busy week with lots of new activity on common sense
gun laws, discussion on tariffs and a visit by Gov. Arnold
Schwarzenegger. Read more below!

Peter, it's been a busy week
with lots of new activity on common sense gun laws, discussion on
tariffs and a visit by Gov. Arnold Schwarzenegger. Read more
below!

Common-Sense Gun Laws:

In November, Gov. Kasich called
for bringing together interested people on all sides of the gun
issue to sit down and find common ground. The goal was to respect
2nd Amendment rights while finding reasonable, common-sense and
constitutional ways to reduce the terrible toll of violence.

The group reached unanimous
agreement on important proposals to help make Ohioans safer from
gun violence.

On Thursday, members of the group
joined Gov. Kasich at a statehouse to announce the details. You
can read more here.

VICE News Sits Down w/ Gov. John
Kasich to Discuss Gun Violence:

If you agree, please take a
moment to sign our petition and help us get this message out far
and wide: JohnKasich.com/CommonSenseGunLaws

Statement on Tariffs:

In response to President Trump's
announcement of tariffs on steel and aluminum imports, Gov.
Kasich released the following statement:

Sunday Show Interview:

Gov. Kasich was a guest on CNN's
"State of the Union" on Sunday morning. Watch the interview here:

Gov. Arnold Schwarzenegger Visits
the Statehouse:

While in Ohio for the Arnold
Sports Festival, Gov. Schwarzenegger visited the statehouse to
toast Austrian schnapps to Republican and Democrat leaders Ohio
House and Ohio Senate for their bipartisan work to improve the
way Ohio draws its congressional lines. It's another common-sense
effort that will make the process more fair and help end the
polarization in Washington.

After-School All-Stars

Gov. Kasich and First Lady Karen
Kasich joined Gov. Schwarzenegger at a special event for
After-School All-Stars - an organization that creates programs to
keep children safe and help them succeed in school and in life.

THANK YOU!

We exceeded our fundraising goal
in February and appreciate the work so many of you do to fight
for a better country and support Gov. Kasich's message. Thank
you!

If you missed our fundraising
push, you can still make a generous online donation here!

See you next time!

-Team Kasich

P.S. In case you missed our
previous email, here are some other quick news clips:

Recent News:

1. In addition to recently
announcing that Gov. Kasich will visit New Hampshire in early
April to participate in a panel discussion, it was also announced
that Gov. Kasich has accepted the invitation to deliver the
commencement address for Harvard Kennedy School class of 2018 on
May 23rd. Read more (here)

2. Gov. Kasich was recently
listed in The Hill's "10 Governors Shaping the Future of
Politics" - Read more (here)

3. Gov. Kasich submitted an op-ed
to a prominent German newspaper about America's diminishing role
in the world to coincide with the Munich Security Conference. He
was scheduled to speak at the conference, but - due to the tragic
deaths of two police officers in his hometown - he instead chose
to attend their funeral and support the community during that
difficult time. Read the op-ed (here)

4. Gov. Kasich was awarded the
Economic Patriot Award by The Concord Coalition for his ongoing
work to challenge Washington to balance America's budget and
avoid burdening future generations with runaway debt.

5. We wanted to share one final
clip with you from Sunday's ABC "This Week" appearance. Gov.
Kasich responds to a question about how he intends to support
candidates in 2018:

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/is0XuFCVNL

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/os0XuFCVNL

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Team Maggie
subject: PETITION: Last chance to save the free & open Internet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd0/2a380d31/48a9edf/f1e85e/2477592361/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd0/2a380d31/48a9edf/f1e85e/2477592361/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team -- The Senate has just a few weeks left to overturn the FCC's disastrous decision to end net neutrality, the rules that guarantee a free and open Internet.
[**Please sign our petition urging the Senate to protect net neutrality.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd0/2a380d31/48a9edf/f1e85f/2477592361/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/save_net_neutrality/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_netneut_up%3Frefcode%3De20180224_netneutJA_up")
Upholding the net neutrality repeal could mean that Internet service providers would be able to censor, block, slow down or slap a fee on any site of their choosing, and it could mean that you have to pay extra to access your email or read your favorite news outlet.
Time is running out -- the Senate only has a few more weeks to protect a free and open Internet.
[**Please join grassroots activists across the country and put your name down to call on the Senate to protect the Internet as we know it.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd0/2a380d31/48a9edf/f1e85f/2477592361/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/save_net_neutrality/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_netneut_up%3Frefcode%3De20180224_netneutJA_up")
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd0/2a380d31/48a9edf/f1e858/2477592361/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9uZXRuZXV0X3VwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODAzMDNfTmV0TmV1dHJhbGl0eUpBcnNfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_netneut_up?refcode=e20180303_NetNeutralityJArs_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfd0/2a380d31/48a9edf/f1e859/2477592361/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: ICYMI: NowThis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403ac93/3264727058/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")
Hello,

If we learned anything in February, it's that now, more than ever, Florida needs a Governor who is ready to fight -- and beat -- the gun lobby. Thankfully, I've done it twice already, and I'm not backing down anytime soon.

Our families and kids deserve so much better than what they're getting from our lawmakers -- so it's about time we elect a leader who will fight for them.

**[Check out this new video from _NowThis_ , a top digital platform, that highlights my years-long fight against the gun industry -- and then share it with your friends.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403ac92/3264727058/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/andrewgillumfl/posts/10155102950251021")**
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403ac92/3264727058/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/andrewgillumfl/posts/10155102950251021") [Share on Facebook](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403ac95/3264727058/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.facebook.com/andrewgillumfl/posts/10155102950251021") | [Tweet on Twitter](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403ac94/3264727058/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/home?status=Check%20out%20%40AndrewGillum's%20newest%20%40nowthisnews%20video%20%3E%3E%20http%3A//bit.ly/2HWtLNh")
---|---
The NRA's wish lists and gun lobbyists should never come before our children's safety, but that's exactly what Florida's legislators are doing. I'm proud to stand with the students, parents and activists who are demanding common sense gun reform -- but we need to keep the pressure on our lawmakers if we want to see real change.

**[So take a few minutes and watch _NowThis_ ' video about my fight for gun safety and then share with your friends and family.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403ac92/3264727058/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/andrewgillumfl/posts/10155102950251021")**

Thank you,

Andrew

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403ac97/3264727058/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403ac96/3264727058/VEsO/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3192/9e00690/42f678ec/2403aca9/3264727058/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

Thankfully, I've done it twice already, and I'm not backing down anytime soon. Our families and kids deserve so much better than what they're getting from our lawmakers -- so it's about time we elect a leader who will fight for them. "" "" "" | "" ---|--- The NRA's wish lists and gun lobbyists should never come before our children's safety, but that's exactly what Florida's legislators are doing. Survey Response: **PENDING** ](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfdf/73a2bc12/3e720528/1fccd146/1990471662/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/voting-rights-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+Supporter+ID+CONS%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09%09%09%09%09%09Survey+Res") | | [CLICK HERE TO BEGIN THE SURVEY ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfdf/73a2bc12/3e720528/1fccd145/1990471662/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/voting-rights-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+CLICK+HERE+TO+BEGIN+THE+SURVEYnbsprarr")
---

Hey --

Just last month, Governor Tom Wolf REJECTED Pennsylvania Republicans' gerrymandered map. Now Pennsylvania has new maps that are fair and represent the people.

_But Republicans are going to the Supreme Court to try to keep their gerrymandered maps in place!_

Look, Republicans will go to any level to suppress the right to vote. Gerrymandering is just one way that they are trying to rig elections in their favor.

We're fighting back to make our elections fair and to protect the right to vote. And we want to hear from you in the process!
**[Click here to share your thoughts in our new Voting Rights Survey >>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfdf/73a2bc12/3e720528/1fccd144/1990471662/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/voting-rights-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+share+your+thoughts+in+our")**
[](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfdf/73a2bc12/3e720528/1fccd14b/1990471662/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/voting-rights-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=7")
---
Governor Tom Wolf knows that the right to vote is essential to our democracy.

That's why he's enacted online voter registration -- and it's why he's fighting to make voting even easier by pushing for automatic voter registration and same day voter registration.

_But Republicans have abused the system for decades to shut out voters from our democratic process._

They've gerrymandered districts, passed strict voter ID laws, and closed down polling locations. Their voter suppression tactics must be stopped.

Governor Wolf is fighting back to make it easier, not harder, to vote. But he needs your input as we move forward.

**[Please, take just 1-minute to complete our Voting Rights Survey today:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfdf/73a2bc12/3e720528/1fccd14a/1990471662/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/voting-rights-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=8+-+Please+take+just+1minute+to+complete+our")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Voting-Rights-Survey](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfdf/73a2bc12/3e720528/1fccd149/1990471662/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/voting-rights-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=9+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomVotingRightsSurve")**

Thank you for your input,

_Wolf for PA_

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfdf/73a2bc12/3e720528/1fccd148/1990471662/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&source=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_")
We believe that emails are an important way for the campaign to stay in contact with supporters like you. This campaign appreciates any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. [Click here](mailto:info@wolfforpa.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact the campaign with any questions, concerns, or ideas. [Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfdf/73a2bc12/3e720528/1fccd14f/1990471662/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=11+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_&source=em18_180304_voting_clk_clq_act_sur_") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.

name: Team Manchin
subject: Do you know Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49819b48/2efbf85c/63f299c0/4c928981/3688221613/VEsH/ "http://www.joemanchinwv.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304&source=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304&refcode=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304")

Friend,

Recently, Joe's been on the receiving end of a series of unfair attacks and smears from Vice President Mike Pence, Senator Mitch McConnell, and convicted coal baron Don Blankenship. But we're not going to sit back and take it.

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we blew through our February goal and are going to be able to show people the truth about Joe. He's a strong advocate for West Virginia's working families, coal miners, and veterans.

[**That 's why we've created the #IKnowJoe video series to get the word out. Will you click here to watch and share the second video in our series?**](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49819b48/2efbf85c/63f299c0/4c928980/3688221613/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/JoeManchinWV/videos/909883812506530/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquove+created+the+IKn&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304&source=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304&refcode=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304")

[](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49819b48/2efbf85c/63f299c0/4c92898f/3688221613/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/JoeManchinWV/videos/909883812506530/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304&source=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304&refcode=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180304")
Thanks for fighting back with Joe!

Team Manchin |

|
---

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
